form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (30.54) over 520m at Q Parklands. Nicely drawn on the inside and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 0.8 lengths at this track (19.89) beating Goldstar Grace in a Grade 5 on April 1 six days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Q Parklands over 520m in 29.93. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 520m at Q Parklands at Grade 5 level. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame at her last three runs, the latest finishing third at big odds in 30.41 at Q Parklands. Drawn awkwardly. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an impressive winner scoring by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at Capalaba and clocking an excellent 19.60 for the 366m trip. Can come into calculations at odds.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 457m (25.46) beating Give Me Bucks in Grade 4/5 on March 28. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 9 lengths (22.15) behind Hara's Pumpkin in a Grade 5 on April 2. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd on April 1 over 350m at Q Straight behind Hooked On Kisses beaten 1.75 lengths (19.20) in a Grade 5. Broke a two-start winning streak with the placing last time. Can bounce back.
